reviews.review_description:
Ive played quite a few shooters on the quest and I gotta say this is already at the top of the list. The graphics are vibrant, gameplay is buttery smooth and the sound is near perfect for this type of game. Tbh this might be the best display of graphics ive seen across all quest 2 genres. They're that good. The snap turning is by far the best ive experienced in VR, period. Not sure how they managed to get it so smooth, amazing. Looking forward to the full release.

Thanks for the response. Glad to see there will be a roguelike mode update. Def gotta check this out

developer_response.body: We're aiming to add "endless mode" and "arcade mode" which will be a roguelike experience with a new unlockable secret level, to be honest that was in our plans from the beginning but we had to postpone arcade mode after release. It will come for sure though with a free update. Thanks for the appreciation of the graphics, we really tried to push quest 2 to it's limit, not gonna lie it was a big challenge, took a long time to do it but we're really happy with the result! Thanks a lot for your review.

reviews.review_description: This is what casual VR is all about -- fun to play for maybe 10-15 minutes at a time. That's not a dig -- I love a game I can just pick up and play, have a lot of fun, then go about my day. Looking forward to the full version.

developer_response.body: Hei thanks for your comment. Rating and feedback is really important for us devs, it makes the game better and better. So that's why I'm asking... Anything you would add to the game to get us a 5 star rating?

reviews.review_description: This game is Awesome, thank you.

developer_response.body: You're Awesome, Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: My bhaptics kit and me looking forward to the full version !! Awesome game ! 😍 look at my profile picture and you will understand why I like this kind of game 😉(1992)
The demo looks impressive and its fun to play. Cant wait till 26.okt 😀

I’ve tried to install this on Quest 2 twice and both times it fails to load the game. It may be because permissions to access the local camera, mic, and files were denied, but this is not indicated as a requirement to run the game. Shame, if I had enjoyed the demo I was planning to purchase.

reviews.review_title: Brilliant look and feel. Def' buy.
reviews.review_description:
I downloaded this because I just got a Quest 2 and the demo is free. I didn't expect much and was delighted with the experience of playing the game. The graphic style looks great to me, a bit Tron, a bit Last Star Fighter. The gun and bullet time controIs are responsive and feel right. I can get motion sickness from FPS games and was delighted to find that I didn't here. I don't know if it's frame rate or something else, but everything felt super smooth and not at all jarring. The boss at the end of the level reminded me of Star Fox and Resident Evil 4 boss fights and ended the demo on a high.
I"m looking forward to getting the full game when I have an opportunity to.
Really like this. Movement feels good and shooting is nice. Graphics are great and enemies are varied with suitably good AI for their purpose. Can't wait for the full thing!

developer_response.body: Thanks!!! Full release is coming this october! We'll keep you posted!

reviews.review_description: When you hear about a game that takes place in an arcade machine in the 80s, you imagine a fast shooter focused on reaction. But it's a slow monotonous FPS. Thanks for the demo and the opportunity to try before buying.

reviews.review_title: cant wait for the full version
reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed the game, good work devs. one thing i would change is the reload (its kind of hard to reload. also would be cool to have a full auto gun) other than that, exellent game.

developer_response.body: Hi Andrew, thanks for the review! We are already working on a faster and easier reload mechanic, it will be online in a few days. Thanks again for your feedback!

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this game would definitely buy full game. Its quite difficult though and just struggled getting past the boss on easy mode. 🙄

This game has been on my radar for a cool min, the only thing that held me back from buying was the price tag. $20.00 is on the high side in my opinion for app lab game, It’s not ludicrous but high. a $10-14.99 seems more appropriate for no multiplayer. 
 The game demo in itself is enjoyable and it’s a novelty game built with tons of nostalgia. Love the premise of the game, game play is good  juss needs more and a cut price for the masses. 😎😉

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your feedback! Price cut is coming soon! :)

reviews.review_description:
Unlike pistol whip and beat blaster, this game requires to move by pressing buttons. As a result, i don't really dodge bullets with my body but more with the joysticks. Looks good but i had to stop after a few minutes due to motion sickness (I feel worse  with beat blaster).
Overall it's good but not for me

developer_response.body: You could try playing with the teleport option enables in the option panel, get game get's a bit more difficult but still doable. Please let us know if this solves your problem with motion sickness. Thanks a lot for your feedback it makes the game better and better.

reviews.review_description: Remember playing this when it was on sidequest and twas quite entertaining, unfortunately no matter how many times I redownload this thru oculus now that it's on app lab it won't load and just crashes my whole quest 2. Would be great to play the newer version someday

developer_response.body: We're already looking into this issue, we're sorry you can't play. It's our first game and we might have uploaded it wrong, it's definetly a problem on our side. If you want you can join our Discord https://discord.gg/zD5fq2qZZ3 there might be someone who could help. We already asked if anyone has had this same issue. We're working on it, we'll let you know when it's fixed.

reviews.review_description:
I downloaded this game (free) successful.  Opened it, got into some room, saw an arcade game, grabbed the gun and pointed at start or enter (not sure which).  Everthing went black and that’s all.  I exited to quit, tried again and nothing…won’t open or anything.  So I uninstalled and installed and tried again.  Seemed to install properly but will not open.  The three dots come up and nothing, not even the room, arcade game…nothing.  So I uninstalled again, rebooted my headset, installed again, and still nothing.  Devs please help me to play your game….





Playing with Quest 2

Installed again.  Still nothing but three dots.  Uninstalled.

I would purchase but afraid full version won’t work either….please help

Wednesday, August 24:  still unable to play.  After being uninstalled for days, I tired again.  Everything seemed to install correctly.  Opened and was asked the question “allow” access to everything, etc., which I declined and then the standard “don’t ask again.”  So I’m excited thinking I’m FINALLY going to get to play, then the three dots appear and that’s as far as it goes.  I’m very frustrated with the desire to play this game.  I am using Oculus Quest 2, have had no issues installing any other games and playing.  PLEASE HELP.

developer_response.body: Hi Scorpiostinger, sorry for late reply. That's pretty weird never happened to us... Are you playing on quest 1 or 2?
